summary: Great soundboard clarity with a solid but not spectacular performance.
review: The recording is praised for its crystal‑clear sound quality, earning a perfect five‑star rating from the reviewer. The show itself is described as good—pretty enjoyable—but falls short of the band's peak performances, resulting in an overall four‑star rating. Listeners can expect a clean mix even if the musical set isn’t among the Dead’s most legendary nights.

ai_rating.rationale: One review rates sound quality at 5 stars and the show at 4 stars; weighted average (70% show, 30% recording) yields ~4.0.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes great sound quality with no issues mentioned; clear and balanced mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; overall performance described as good but not among the best.
